name: @metorial/certifier
description: Create, issue, send, and manage digital credentials such as certificates and badges. Organize credentials into groups by course, program, or event. Issue credentials to recipients via email, track credential interactions (views, downloads, shares), and manage credential lifecycles (draft, scheduled, issued, expired). Retrieve certificate and badge design templates, set custom attributes, and create-issue-send credentials in a single automated step. Supports webhook events for credential lifecycle changes including creation, updates, deletion, and issuance.
